text:
luences are involved, then
death can be predicted in the Dasa' of the 6th lord and
Bhukti of Lagnadhipati. Consistent with the nature of the
sum-total of influences involved in the above combination,
either death or most adverse events will take place.
When the 6th lord joins the 3rd lord in the 3rd, the
person will have misunderstandings with his brothers. He
will have ear or throat complaints or deafness or injuries to
the neck, lose self-confidence and incur the enmity of
friends. When benefics join, there will be a lessening of
these evil effects. When Mars is weak, brothers will suffer
from illness or death.
When the 6th lord is in the 4th, and Rahu and the Moon
are together, mother's honour will be at stake during the
Dasa of the 6th lord. If the Dasa comes late in life, the
person's health will be in great jeopardy. When Mars is
weak, the native's immovable properties will be auctioned
or lost to his enemies. If Mercury is weak, he will fail in
